description: Cloud Logging spikes after a debug log level was left on in a high-traffic microservice across all regions.

root_cause.summary: A feature-flag rollout left LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG on in the checkout service. DEBUG emits request/response payloads; log volume grew ~8x.
root_cause.remediation: Set LOG_LEVEL=INFO, add a log-volume alert at 2x week-over-week, sample DEBUG rather than emitting all of it.
